description: FloatSpace Warehouse URL Configuration. Only this file is modified during failover.

warehouses.name: Recovered Gmail (Front Line)
warehouses.notes: Primary warehouse. Google Apps Script on Recovered Gmail account.

warehouses.name: Aged Backup Gmail (Failover 1)
warehouses.notes: Cold standby. Apps Script deployed but URL not used unless Front Line fails.

warehouses.name: Workspace Account (Failover 2)
warehouses.notes: Emergency fallback. Google Workspace account for redundancy.

failoverRules.description: OpenClaw monitors active URL every 60s. After 3 failures, swap to next standby.
